title: Ascendant Empyrean
content:
It is a level above False Empyrean Exalt but still belongs to The Great Circle of Kong Jie 空劫 (
Void Tribulant
).

Every single Ascendant Empyrean is personally appointed by the 
Celestial Ancestor
 and has their name added to the Ascendant Empyrean List. This list only appears when someone successfully passes the 10th palace. Everyone on the list receives the Celestial Ancestor’s protection.

Only 22 of the current 49 Ascendant Empyreans have passed the 11th of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Notable Members
[
]

Wang Lin
, strongest Ascendant Empyrean who passed 17 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Wang Lin passed the 5th-17th palaces consecutively.

He is a nominal subordinate of 
Gemini
.

Ming Dao
, former strongest Ascendant Empyrean who passed 16 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Ming Dao passed the 10th, 11th, and 12th palaces consecutively.

He is a subordinate of the 
Celestial Emperor
.

Cai Wei, Ascendant Empyrean who passed 14 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Cai Wei passed the 10th and 11th palaces consecutively.

Luo Yunhai
, 
Great Soul Sect
's Ninth Ancestor (Deceased).

Dong Lin's Sect's Old Ancestor.

Snow Rain, Ascendant Empyrean who passed 10 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

He is a subordinate of 
Wu Feng
.

Dao Wheel, Ascendant Empyrean who passed 10 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Meng Shuang, Ascendant Empyrean who passed 10 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Tiny Child, Ascendant Empyrean who passed 11 of the 19 palaces in the Ascendant Empyrean Trial.

Heavenly Flame

Chen Fan

Shattered Dream

Han Dan
